summary: Tested WhatsApp Inbox and Staff Portal features for iteration 66. Fixed route ordering bug in whatsapp.py where /messages/auto-cleanup-48h was being matched as {message_id}. All 7 backend API tests pass (100%). Frontend code review verified all features implemented correctly. OTP authentication blocks automated UI testing.

issues: OTP authentication (MSG91) blocks automated UI testing - requires real OTP verification

critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: Route ordering bug in /app/backend/routes/whatsapp.py - /messages/auto-cleanup-48h was being matched as {message_id} parameter. Moved auto-cleanup-48h route BEFORE {message_id} route.
WhatsApp Inbox staffMode prop shows 'Your leads only' text in header (line 710)
Staff Portal pipeline stages are clickable buttons with cursor-pointer and hover:scale-105 (line 726)
Pipeline stage filter (pipelineStageFilter) applied to both desktop (line 929) and mobile (line 1035) lead views
Clear Filter button shows when pipelineStageFilter is active (line 893)
48-hour auto-cleanup runs in background when fetching conversations (lines 785-799 in whatsapp.py)

success_rate.frontend: Code review verified - OTP auth blocks automated UI testing

context_for_next_testing_agent: Staff/Admin login requires OTP authentication (MSG91). Backend API tests can be run without authentication. The route ordering bug in whatsapp.py has been fixed - /messages/auto-cleanup-48h must be defined BEFORE /messages/{message_id} to avoid route conflict.

backend_apis.GET /api/whatsapp/messages/cleanup-statu: PASS - Returns message counts by age (within_24h, 24h_to_48h, older_than_48h)
backend_apis.DELETE /api/whatsapp/messages/auto-clean: PASS - Deletes messages older than 48h (BUG FIXED - route ordering)

frontend_components_verified.WhatsAppInbox.js - staffMode prop: VERIFIED - Line 302: staffMode=false default, Line 710: 'Your leads only' text
frontend_components_verified.WhatsAppInbox.js - Mobile-friendly desig: VERIFIED - Compact header, smaller avatars, touch-friendly buttons
frontend_components_verified.StaffPortal.js - Pipeline stage filter: VERIFIED - Line 70: pipelineStageFilter state, Lines 929/1035: filter applied to both views
frontend_components_verified.StaffPortal.js - Clear Filter button: VERIFIED - Line 893: 'Clear Filter' button when filter active

bug_fixed.root_cause: Route ordering in FastAPI - /messages/{message_id} was defined before /messages/auto-cleanup-48h, causing 'auto-cleanup-48h' to be matched as a message_id parameter

rca_of_issue: FastAPI routes are matched in order of definition. The parameterized route /messages/{message_id} was catching all requests including /messages/auto-cleanup-48h. Fixed by defining the specific route before the parameterized route.
